title: UPDATE DAY 3: Letting an AI manage a Robinhood Account 😭
author: North_Teacher_7522
selftext:
On Wednesday I started a real-money experiment: I put $1,000 into a fresh Robinhood account and let an AI choose the allocation.

Julius hesitated to make any picks today with the market flipping gamma-negative and decided to hold its positions rather than rebalancing. It was a tough day for everyone (except bears).

Initial picks were made by the AI playing the momentum trade, but it just happened to be right as momentum in the market flipped 😞

Current stats:

Day 3: $858.73

P/L: -$141.27 / -14.13%

Positions: 1 share AMD, 3 shares INOD

Cash/buying power: $88.57

This experiment is done with real money, with positions disclosed on every update, losses included, no hidden trades, and all trades made by Julius AI. This is not financial advice.

I will be **adding more money** to the AI account to buy the dip on Monday and double down on the experiment. Stay tuned for more 🍿
